prompt.task: Extract structured data from the customer support email. Preserve business-relevant information while redacting all PII.
prompt.context: You are processing customer support emails for a ticketing system. Extracted data will be used for routing, prioritization, and analytics. Output will be stored in logs and dashboards accessible to multiple teams. Therefore, NO personally identifiable information should appear in the output.

pii_policy.policy: Never output: names, email addresses, phone numbers, account numbers, addresses, or any other identifying information.
For people mentioned, output only the COUNT and their ROLE/RELATIONSHIP, not names or identifiers.
For contact methods, output only that they were PROVIDED, not the values.
If a direct quote is needed, paraphrase to remove any identifiers.

fields.field: Primary category: billing, technical, account_access, shipping, feedback, other
More specific classification within the category
low, medium, high, critical - based on language and situation
Any dates referenced: {"date": "YYYY-MM-DD or description", "context": "what the date refers to"}
Any amounts mentioned: {"amount": "$X.XX", "context": "what the amount refers to"}
Inferred type: individual, business, unknown (NOT the customer's name or ID)
Count of distinct people mentioned (NOT their names)
Types only: ["email", "phone", "address"] - NOT the actual values
Whether an account number/ID was mentioned (NOT the number itself)
Whether an order number was mentioned (NOT the number itself)
Required actions, paraphrased to remove any PII
What kind of response: refund, technical_help, account_recovery, information, escalation
True if the request is complex or sensitive enough to need human attention
Why human review is needed, if applicable

constraints.constraint: Output must contain ZERO PII - no names, emails, phones, addresses, account numbers, order numbers, or other identifiers.
Use placeholders for any references: "the customer", "the account", "the order" - never actual values.
All action_items must be paraphrased to remove identifiers. Example: "Call John at 555-1234" becomes "Customer requests callback".
If extracting a quote, replace names with "[customer]" or "[representative]".

prompt.input:
From: sarah.johnson@example.com To: support@company.com Subject: Double charge on my account - URGENT
Hi,
My name is Sarah Johnson and I'm writing because I was charged twice for order #ORD-98765 placed on January 5th. Each charge was $149.99 so I've been overcharged $149.99.
My account number is ACC-12345678. I've been a customer since 2019 and this has never happened before. I spoke with Mike from your team last week (reference #TKT-456) but the issue still isn't resolved.
Please refund the duplicate charge to my card ending in 4532 ASAP. You can reach me at 555-867-5309 or at this email.
This is really frustrating as I'm a loyal customer.
Thanks, Sarah Johnson 123 Main Street Springfield, IL 62701
prompt.output_format: Return valid JSON exactly matching the field specifications above. Verify that NO actual PII values appear anywhere in the output. Use null for fields where information is not available.

checks.check: Verify no email addresses (containing @) appear in output
Verify no phone numbers (digit sequences 7+) appear in output
Verify no names appear in output (check against names in input)
Verify no account/order numbers appear in output
Verify action_items are paraphrased, not quoted directly
